---
title: "Research"
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/*.ipynb"
    - "posts/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  feed: true
  image-placeholder: "assets/research-placeholder.svg"
page-layout: full
---

This page collects reproducible explorations for the TimeAnalysis project.
Each card is generated automatically from a Jupyter notebook or Quarto post
committed to `research/posts/`.
